todaysResult.headline: Rodent activity was high today.
todaysResult.body: We found roof rat activity in the attic, set 6 snap traps in the attic and 2 glue boards in the garage, and identified two entry points that need sealing.
todaysResult.nextStep: We'll return in 3 days to check and reset traps.
